headline: Veeam Recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Backup and Data Protection Platforms
summary: SEATTLE, April 01, 2026--Veeam named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer’: Backup and Data Protection Platforms
